objective: Implement the Session/Artifact store, manifest pipeline and host-volume storage coordination.
deliverables: Session directory/manifest store with immutable raw artifacts and rebuildable derived artifacts.
Per-volume admission with metadata headroom, heavy-writer serialization and claim accounting.
ENOSPC and volume-removal handling that finalizes partial state without fabricating success.

verification.expectedEvidence: Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/session-artifact-storage/spec.md#AC-ART-001-01 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.
Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/session-artifact-storage/spec.md#AC-ART-002-01 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.

Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/session-artifact-storage/spec.md#AC-ART-006-02 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.

verification.method: Volume identity, storage admission and ENOSPC injection suite.
verification.expectedEvidence: Same-volume different-path claims share one budget, the second heavy writer waits or is rejected, metadata headroom survives external disk pressure, and runtime ENOSPC finalizes completed shards and fails closed.

stopConditions: A raw artifact can be modified in place after publication.
Two heavy writers are admitted to one volume in MVP mode.
